userStories.title: Initialize Vite + React project with TypeScript
userStories.description: Use Vite to scaffold a new React + TypeScript project in the current directory. Run `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts` to create the base project files (index.html, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx).
acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.ts exists with react-ts template
tsconfig.json is configured for React/TypeScript
index.html exists with root div and Vite script
src/main.tsx renders App component
src/App.tsx is a functional React component

userStories.title: Install React and Vite dependencies
userStories.description: Run npm install to install all dependencies defined in package.json. This includes react, react-dom, vite, and TypeScript dev dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json contains react, react-dom dependencies
package.json contains vite and @vitejs/plugin-react
package.json contains TypeScript and @types/react, @types/react-dom
node_modules directory exists after install
package-lock.json is generated

userStories.title: Configure Vite for development
userStories.description: Set up vite.config.ts with the React plugin and configure the dev server to run on localhost with hot module replacement.
acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.ts imports and uses @vitejs/plugin-react
Dev server runs on port 5173 (default Vite port)
Hot module replacement is enabled
Build output is configured to dist folder

userStories.title: Create src directory structure
userStories.description: Organize the src folder with standard React project structure: components/, pages/, hooks/, utils/, types/, and assets/. Move App.tsx and main.tsx to the appropriate locations.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/ directory exists for reusable components
src/pages/ directory exists for page-level components
src/hooks/ directory exists for custom hooks
src/utils/ directory exists for utility functions
src/types/ directory exists for TypeScript types

userStories.title: Set up basic CSS/global styles
userStories.description: Create a global CSS file with base styles (reset, font settings, CSS variables for theming). Import it in main.tsx. Create index.css or App.css with foundational styles.
acceptanceCriteria: Global CSS file imports normalize/reset styles
CSS variables are defined for colors and spacing
Global styles are imported in main.tsx
Body has proper font-family and box-sizing settings
